macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google announces new Gemini models and AI agents at I/O
items.summary: Google reportedly unveiled the first Gemini 3.5 model, Gemini 3.5 Flash, along with Gemini Omni, an AI video generator, and new agent features for Search, Gmail, Docs, and YouTube. The company also introduced Gemini Spark and AI-enabled eyewear partnerships with Warby Parker, Gentle Monster, and Samsung.

items.title: Meta reportedly hires four more OpenAI researchers
items.summary: Meta has reportedly hired Shengjia Zhao, Jiahui Yu, Shuchao Bi, and Hongyu Ren from OpenAI, underscoring the ongoing competition for top AI talent. The report highlights intensifying rivalry among leading AI labs.

items.title: OpenAI ChatGPT outage disrupts users
items.summary: Users reported issues loading prompts as ChatGPT experienced downtime. The incident adds to recent scrutiny of the reliability of major AI services.

items.title: China reportedly tightens travel restrictions on top AI talent
items.summary: Recent reporting says China is expanding travel restrictions affecting leading AI researchers and engineers. The move could influence international collaboration and the global AI talent market.

items.title: AI infrastructure spending continues to surge
items.summary: Market coverage says AMD and semiconductor equipment names rose sharply on AI demand, with the SOXX ETF hitting an all-time high. The trend suggests continued heavy investment in AI infrastructure and chips.

items.title: New arXiv papers focus on LLM memory, quantization, and agent efficiency
items.summary: Recent research submissions on arXiv include work on stress-testing LLM memory systems, post-training quantization for generative models, and prompt compression for LLM agents. These papers reflect active research into making models more reliable and efficient.

items.title: AI talent competition intensifies across major labs
items.summary: Coverage this week points to rising competition for researchers as leading AI companies race to expand model and product capabilities. The broader trend is continued consolidation of talent around a few frontier AI firms.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
